description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish sling bag from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsDark blue velvet finish bagOne main zippered compartmentPatch pocket in front with faux leather flap and magnetic buttoned closureElasticized pockets at the sidesSlots with fabric insert near the mouth of the bag Synthetic lining with zippered pocket and zippered pocket at front and backOne long and adjustable shoulder strapMaterial and CareFabric, syntheticWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 31 cmWidth: 34 cmDepth: 12 cm
